1.note: Hebrew On the first day of the sixth month,

1.anchor: gave a message through the prophet Haggai to Zerubbabel son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Jeshua

15.note: Hebrew on the twenty-fourth day of the sixth month,

1.anchor: Then on October 17 of that same year,
1.note: Hebrew on the twenty-first day of the seventh month,

2.anchor: “Say this to Zerubbabel son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Jeshua

10.note: Hebrew On the twenty-fourth day of the ninth month,

18.anchor: “Think about this eighteenth day of December, the day
18.note: Or On this eighteenth day of December, think about the day.

19.anchor: I am giving you a promise now while the seed is still in the barn.
19.note: Hebrew Is the seed yet in the barn?

20.note: Hebrew On the twenty-fourth day of the [ninth] month;
